Trait CommandRunner

pub trait CommandRunner:
    Send
    + Sync
    + Debug {
    // Required method
    fn run<'life0, 'life1, 'life2, 'async_trait>(
        &'life0 self,
        command: &'life1 str,
        method: &'life2 str,
        args: JsonValue,
    ) -> Pin<Box<dyn Future<Output = Result<JsonValue, Error>> + Send + 'async_trait>>
       where Self: 'async_trait,
             'life0: 'async_trait,
             'life1: 'async_trait,
             'life2: 'async_trait;
}
